title: canarium euryphyllum
intro: Canarium euryphyllum, also known as the Philippine canarium, is a tropical tree species that belongs to the family Burseraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory activities. The oil extracted from the seeds of Canarium euryphyllum has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as skin infections, wounds, and respiratory problems, offering benefits like skin health improvement and immune system support. Herbal preparations of Canarium euryphyllum often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, seeds, or bark, which are used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
